recommendations.title: The Kangaroo Chronicles
recommendations.overview: A communist kangaroo moves in with an artist in Berlin.

recommendations.title: Carmen & Lola

recommendations.title: Spy Kids
recommendations.genres: Family, Action, Comedy, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Carmen and Juni think their parents are boring. Little do they know that in their day, Gregorio and Ingrid Cortez were the top secret agents from their respective countries. They gave up that life to raise their children. Now, the disappearances of s

recommendations.title: The Exorcism of Carmen Farias
recommendations.overview: Carmen, a brave journalist, discovers soon after her mother's death that she has inherited her grandma's house. She decides to move there without knowing it hides dark secrets.

recommendations.title: Eenie Meanie
recommendations.overview: A former teenage getaway driver gets dragged back into her unsavory past when a former employer offers her a chance to save the life of her chronically unreliable ex-boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Sweet Country
recommendations.overview: In 1929, an Australian Aboriginal stockman kills a white station owner in self-defense and goes on the lam, pursued by a posse.

recommendations.title: The Big Sleep
recommendations.overview: Private Investigator Philip Marlowe is hired by wealthy General Sternwood regarding a matter involving his youngest daughter Carmen. Before the complex case is over, Marlowe sees murder, blackmail, deception, and what might be love.

recommendations.title: The White Ribbon
recommendations.overview: An aged tailor recalls his life as the schoolteacher of a small village in Northern Germany that was struck by a series of strange events in the year leading up to WWI.

recommendations.title: Ferry 2
recommendations.overview: After losing his drug empire, Ferry Bouman has found a measure of peace away from Brabant's criminal underworld — until his past catches up to him.
